title: Lowering debt, Jasa Marga to divest shares in Trans Jawa Toll Road
body: PT Jasa Marga (Persero) Tbk (JSMR) has divested its shares in PT Jasamarga Transjawa Tol (JTT) to 3 new investors for deleveraging purposes.

title: Bank Panin to extend its IDR 3.91 trillion bond offering period
body: PT Bank Pan Indonesia Tbk (PNBN) modifies the schedule of the issuance of Shelf-Registration Bond IV Phase II Year 2024 with total principal worth IDR 3.91 trllion.

title: Gov’t raises fund again, eyeing IDR 22 trillion in SUN auction
body: The Indonesian government will once again hold another auction of Government Securities (SUN) yesterday (1/10), with an indicative target of IDR 22 trillion.

title: RUNS to distribute bonus shares to directors and commissioners
body: PT Global Sukses Solusi Tbk (RUNS) has transferred treasury stock gained from buyback as bonus shares to the boards of directors, commissioners, and employees, as well.

title: MCAS to set up buyback, preparing IDR 90.7 billion
body: PT M Cash Integrasi Tbk (MCAS) is planning a shares buyback of 30.2 million shares at most, or equal to 3.48% of its issued and paid-up capital.

title: Lowering debt, Jasa Marga to divest shares in Trans Jawa Toll Road
body: PT Jasa Marga (Persero) Tbk (JSMR) has divested its shares in PT Jasamarga Transjawa Tol (JTT) to 3 new investors for deleveraging purposes.

title: Bank Panin to extend its IDR 3.91 trillion bond offering period
body: PT Bank Pan Indonesia Tbk (PNBN) modifies the schedule of the issuance of Shelf-Registration Bond IV Phase II Year 2024 with total principal worth IDR 3.91 trllion.

title: Gov’t raises fund again, eyeing IDR 22 trillion in SUN auction
body: The Indonesian government will once again hold another auction of Government Securities (SUN) yesterday (1/10), with an indicative target of IDR 22 trillion.

title: RUNS to distribute bonus shares to directors and commissioners
body: PT Global Sukses Solusi Tbk (RUNS) has transferred treasury stock gained from buyback as bonus shares to the boards of directors, commissioners, and employees, as well.

title: MCAS to set up buyback, preparing IDR 90.7 billion
body: PT M Cash Integrasi Tbk (MCAS) is planning a shares buyback of 30.2 million shares at most, or equal to 3.48% of its issued and paid-up capital.

title: SMSM bags dividend income of IDR 8.06 billion
body: PT Selamat Sempurna Tbk (SMSM), an automotive spare part manufacturer, announces dividend income recorded from one of its subsidiaries in Malaysia, Bradke Synergies Sdn Bhd.

title: IDX: 30 companies line up for IPO, another 11 for rights issue
body: Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) authorities reveals that 30 issuers have entered the pipeline for Initial Public Offering (IPO), and another 11 are lining up for rights issue as of September 20, 2024.

title: BJTM rakes in IDR 620.86 billion of profit in H1 2024
body: PT BPD Jawa Timur Tbk (BJTM) scored IDR 620.86 billion of profit in the first half (H1) of 2024, 13.78% year-on-year (yoy) lower from IDR 720.14 billion seen in the same period last year.

title: BI and BNM work on potential currency swap worth IDR 82 trillion
body: Bank Indonesia (BI) and Bank Negara Malaysia (BNM) enable local currency exchange with total value amounting to a maximum of IDR 82 trillion or equal to MYR 24 billion throughout the next 5 years.

title: KRYA secures Mie Sedaap warehouse construction contract
body: PT Bangun Karya Perkasa Jaya Tbk (KRYA), a building construction company, has acquired the contract of the construction of 7 units of warehouses for Mie Sedaap raw ingredient storage.

title: RMK Investama acquires 900 million RMK Energy (RMKE) shares
body: PT RMK Investama made the decision to bolster its stake in coal logistics service provider PT RMK Energy Tbk (RMKE) on Tuesday, September 24. This investor previously owned about 25.14 percent of the shares; however, after adding 900 million shares through PT Ciptadana Sekuritas Asia, this investor now owns 45.71 percent of the shares and is the controlling shareholder. Additionally, the parent company, PT MNC Asia Holding Tbk, has acquired another 260 million shares of its subsidiary, PT MNC Land Tbk (KPIG), which develops and manages resorts and hotels, increasing its ownership to 9.68%.

title: PTPP speeds up IKN Airport completion by the end of this year
body: PT Pembangunan Perumahan (Persero) Tbk (PTPP) is targeting the Nusantara Capital City (IKN) Airport project to be completed at the end of this year.

title: Esta Indonesia to grant subsidiary extra capital of IDR 6 billion
body: PT Esta Indonesia Tbk (NEST), a swallow farm company, has provided extra capital to one of its subsidiaries, PT Tunas Esta Indonesia (TEI).

title: Entering green zone, net foreign volume closed at 456.94 million shares
body: Foreigners purchased and sold shares on Thursday, September 26, bringing net foreign volume into the green zone and closing at 456.94 million shares. The figure was calculated using the difference between foreign buying volume (4.86 billion shares) and foreign selling volume (4.41 billion shares). The digital corporation PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) then had the largest share purchase record at 2.64 billion shares for a net volume of 816.63 million shares.

title: JCI plummeted in early morning session
body: Jakarta Composite Stock Price Index (JCI) slipped since the opening bell today (27/9) until 10.02 AM WIB.

title: BI to fully terminate JIBOR in January 2026
body: Bank Indonesia (BI), the administrator of Jakarta Interbank Offered Rate (JIBOR), will permanently terminate all publications of JIBOR starting January 1, 2026.

title: AKRA to channel extra IDR 18 billion for trading and distribution line
body: PT AKR Corporindo Tbk (AKRA) has channelled extra capital of IDR 18 billion to PT Anugerah Krida Retailindo (Akrida), a subsidiary engaged in the trading and distribution line.

title: Over 4 billion Gojek Tokopedia shares sold, net foreign volume falls to -318.64 billion shares
body: On Wednesday, September 25, shares of the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) were sold in significant numbers, totalling 4.18 billion shares, for a net volume of -122.54 million shares. This transaction helped contribute to the rise of the foreign sales volume at 7.17 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign buying volume was just 6.86 billion shares, resulting in a net foreign volume of -318.64 million shares.

title: Successful spin-off, now OJK revokes Allianz’s sharia unit license
body: Financial Services Authority (OJK) revokes the license of Sharia Unit of PT Asuransi Allianz Life Indonesia (AALI) following the spin-off.

title: Adira Dinamika Multifinance seeks extra IDR 2 trillion from bond issuance
body: PT Adira Dinamika Multifinance Tbk (ADMF), a consumer financing company under PT Bank Danamon Indonesia Tbk (BDMN), plans to issue Shelf-Registration Bond VI Phase IV Year 2024 with total principal of IDR 2 trillion.

title: HOKI eyes healthy rice market through Dailymeal products
body: PT Buyung Poetra Sembada Tbk (HOKI), a premium rice manufacturer and distributor debuted on Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) in 2017, is now eyeing market opportunity arising from high demand for healthy rice through its Dailymeal products.

title: Pertamina and Chevron’s JV get ready for geothermal exploration in Way Ratai
body: PT Cahaya Anagata Energi (CAE), a joint venture (JV) established by PT Pertamina Geothermal Energy Tbk (PGEO) and Chevron New Energies Holdings Indonesia Ltd. (Chevron), is ready to explore Geothermal Work Area of Way Ratai, Lampung.

title: HEXA to distribute cash dividend of USD 38.99 million
body: Shareholders of PT Hexindo Adiperkasa Tbk (HEXA) agreed upon the allocation of cash dividend of USD 38.99 million or USD 0.0464 per share during the Annual General Meeting of Shareholders yesterday (24/9).

title: WSBP to pay CFADS Phase IV worth IDR 84.57 billion
body: PT Waskita Beton Precast Tbk (WSBP) has paid its cash flow available for debt services (CFADS) phase IV worth IDR 84.57 billion.

title: Golden Westindo Artajaya’s debut postponed, low market interest?
body: PT Golden Westindo Arta Jaya Tbk (GWAA) announced the postponement of its initial public offering (IPO), which is initially scheduled from September 27 to October 1, 2024.

title: Bank Mestika to issue 63.02 million treasury shares
body: PT Bank Mestika Dharma Tbk (BBMD) announces the plan of the transfer of 63.02 million treasury shares in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX).

title: Tempo Inti Media's subsidiary receives IDR 21.18 billion of financing from MDIF
body: PT Info Media Digital (IMD), a subsidiary of PT Tempo Inti Media Tbk (TMPO), has secured an investment financing facility of IDR 21.18 billion from Media Development Investment Fund (MDIF).

title: Foreign buying volume surges, net foreign volume surplus at 622.56 million shares
body: Foreign investors increased their share buy transactions on Tuesday, September 24, resulting in a foreign purchase volume of 4.33 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign sales totaled around 3.70 billion shares, which generated a net foreign surplus of 622.56 million shares. The digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) had the greatest share acquisition, with foreign investors buying 1.92 billion shares for a net volume of 382.23 million shares.

title: MNC Digital claims 9% of Multivision Plus (RAAM) shares
body: On Monday, September 23, PT Tripar Multivision Plus Tbk (RAAM) welcomed PT MNC Digital Entertainment Tbk as a new investor. MNC Digital, which holds a direct 9.09% stake in this production company, was able to acquire up to 619.42 million shares through a private placement. However, because of this corporate action, the controller of RAAM, Ram Jethmal Punjabi, actually recorded a decrease in the portion of shares, from 77.33% to 70.3%. More than 4.78 billion shares are listed as being owned by him personally.

title: UOB confident with credit growth projection of 20% this year
body: PT Bank UOB Indonesia is targeting drastic growth in credit distribution rate at the end of 2024, reaching 20% year-on-year (yoy), or far exceeding the projection set by Bank Indonesia (BI) for banking industry.

title: AALI to distribute interim dividend of IDR 161.67 billion
body: PT Astra Agro Lestari Tbk (AALI), one of subsidiaries of PT Astra International Tbk (ASII), engaged in the plantation industry, will distribute interim dividend worth IDR 161.67 billion or IDR 84 per share.

title: Contract got extended, BUMA Australia rakes in AUD 200 million
body: PT Bukit Makmur Mandiri Utama (BUMA), a subsidiary of PT Delta Dunia Makmur Tbk (DOID), obtains an extension for its mining service contract in Meandu Mine, Queensland, Australia, until 2026.

title: VTNY secures loan facility of IDR 275 billion
body: PT Venteny Fortuna International Tbk (VTNY) has acquired a credit facility worth IDR 275 billion from PT Bank Mayapada Internasional Tbk (MAYA) as of yesterday (24/9).

title: Driving domestic economy, UOB Indonesia to boost foreign investment and export
body: With growth projection of Indonesia’s economy in 2024 at 5.2%, Bank UOB Indonesia as the renowned regional bank, is ready to facilitate foreign direct investment (FDI) inflow to Indonesia whilst boosting export volume and portion in GDP.

title: Bank UOB Indonesia links gov’t and industry in UOB Economic Outlook 2025
body: Bank UOB Indonesia officially hosts UOB Economic Outlook 2025 today (25/9) in Jakarta, titled “Ushering a New Dawn for a Remarkable Indonesia”, discussing chances and opportunities to advance Indonesia’s economy in 2025 under the new presidential term.
